scenario_name: Equivalence Evidence Misused as Direct Clinical Evidence
description: Evidence from an equivalent device is being treated as direct clinical evidence on the subject device. System must correct support type to 'equivalent' and cap conclusion strength.

input.ifu_text: Device achieves rapid and durable hemostasis.

available_evidence.findings: Hemostasis success 94% at 3 min. Sustained at 30-day follow-up.

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: All available clinical evidence is from ClosurePro V1 (equivalent device), not NewClosure V2. Support type must be 'equivalent', not 'direct'.
expected_expert_reasoning.reason_for_ceiling: Equivalent device evidence alone, without direct subject-device clinical data, cannot support 'strong' conclusions per MDR Annex XIV.

cer_reasoning_ledger.gap_rationale: No direct clinical evidence on subject device. PMCF should collect subject-device clinical data to confirm equivalence assumptions.
